qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Request Forgery via OAuth2 dynamic client registration serverUrl
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes a sandbox escape in the JavaScript Task Runner. This finding describes SSRF via the OAuth2 credential serverUrl in packages/cli/src/controllers/oauth/oauth2-credential.controller.ts. The vulnerable component (OAuth2 controller vs Task Runner sandbox), vulnerability class (SSRF vs sandbox escape), and root cause (missing URL validation vs sandbox boundary bypass) are entirely different.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Request Forgery via workflow import-from-url endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes a sandbox escape in the JavaScript Task Runner. This finding describes SSRF via the workflow import-from-url endpoint in packages/cli/src/workflows/workflows.controller.ts. The vulnerable component (workflow controller vs Task Runner sandbox), vulnerability class (SSRF vs sandbox escape), and root cause (missing URL validation on import endpoint vs sandbox boundary bypass in Task Runner) are entirely different.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-jjpj-p2wh-qf23) describes a sandbox escape in the n8n JavaScript Task Runner, where an authenticated user can execute arbitrary code outside the sandbox boundary when N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED=true. Neither of the two qualifying findings identifies this vulnerable code or root cause. The findings describe: (1) SSRF via OAuth2 dynamic client registration, and (2) SSRF via workflow import-from-url. Both are different vulnerability classes in different code components from the advisory-described Task Runner sandbox escape.
evidence: Advisory root cause: sandbox escape in JavaScript Task Runner requiring N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED=true
ssrf-oauth2-dynamic-registration root cause: missing SSRF protection in OAuth2 credential serverUrl (packages/cli/src/controllers/oauth/oauth2-credential.controller.ts)
ssrf-workflow-import-from-url root cause: missing SSRF protection on workflow import URL parameter (packages/cli/src/workflows/workflows.controller.ts)
No finding references Task Runner, sandbox, N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED, or the Task Runner code paths
